rule.zh: 所有动作均为PPT建议或由其差距直接形成的验证任务，不表示立项、完成或承诺日期。
rule.en: All actions are PPT recommendations or validation tasks directly derived from its gaps. They do not indicate approval, completion or committed timing.

conclusion.zh: 把基础机、配重、快换、拇指钳和常用铲斗作为完整运输包核算，而非只比较裸机重量。
conclusion.en: Evaluate the full transport package—base machine, counterweight, coupler, thumb and common buckets—rather than comparing bare-machine mass only.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide

action.zh: 建立配置化称重清单并验证14K拖车实际载荷余量。
action.en: Create a configuration-based weighing bill and validate practical payload margin on a 14K trailer.

target_reference.zh: PPT历史方案：PRO基础机3,800 kg；是否仍为当前目标待确认。
target_reference.en: Historical PPT reference: 3,800 kg PRO base machine; current target status requires confirmation.

verification.zh: 实机称重、轴荷/拖车载荷核算、合规复核。
verification.en: Physical weighing, axle/trailer payload calculation and compliance review.

conclusion.zh: XE35U高速3.6 km/h，PPT列出的久保田对标值为4.6 km/h，差1.0 km/h。
conclusion.en: XE35U high travel speed is listed at 3.6 km/h versus 4.6 km/h for the Kubota benchmarks, a 1.0 km/h gap.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide

action.zh: 联合评估发动机功率、主泵排量、行走马达和控制标定，不把速度提升孤立为单一零部件任务。
action.en: Jointly evaluate engine power, pump displacement, travel motor and control calibration rather than treating speed as a single-component change.

target_reference.zh: 以4.6 km/h作为竞品参考，不代表已批准产品目标。
target_reference.en: Use 4.6 km/h as a benchmark reference, not an approved product target.

verification.zh: 平地/坡地速度、牵引力、热平衡、启停冲击和油耗联合测试。
verification.en: Combined tests for level/grade speed, drawbar pull, thermal balance, start-stop shock and fuel use.

conclusion.zh: AUX1最大流量40 L/min，低于久保田60 L/min和三一70 L/min；同时PPT未列出XE35U卸油管路。
conclusion.en: Maximum AUX1 flow is listed at 40 L/min versus 60 L/min for Kubota and 70 L/min for SANY; the PPT also does not list a case-drain line on XE35U.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide

action.zh: 定义高流量属具清单，评估AUX1流量、压力、背压、冷却和卸油回路的系统方案。
action.en: Define the high-flow attachment set and evaluate AUX1 flow, pressure, back pressure, cooling and case-drain architecture as one system.

target_reference.zh: 60 L/min为久保田参考；具体目标必须由属具需求和热平衡确定。
target_reference.en: 60 L/min is the Kubota reference; the engineering target must be set by attachment demand and thermal balance.

verification.zh: 破碎锤、割草机/开带机等连续负载循环及油温、背压测试。
verification.en: Continuous-load cycles with breaker, mower/brush cutter, including oil-temperature and back-pressure tests.

conclusion.zh: 市政、地基、景观和道路场景重复指出回转回填效率不足，并建议推土铲浮动与四向/偏摆功能。
conclusion.en: Municipal, foundation, landscape and road scenarios repeatedly identify weak swing-assisted backfill productivity and recommend blade float plus four-way/angle functions.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide

action.zh: 把回转力矩、回转制动线性、推土铲浮动和偏摆功能作为一个回填效率包验证。
action.en: Validate swing torque, swing-braking linearity, blade float and blade angling as one backfill-productivity package.

target_reference.zh: PPT未给出竞品回转力矩定量值，禁止自行填入目标。
target_reference.en: The PPT provides no quantified competitor swing-torque value; no target may be invented.

verification.zh: 统一土质下的沟槽回填循环时间、平整误差、油耗和操作者评分。
verification.en: Backfill cycle time, grade error, fuel use and operator assessment in controlled soil conditions.

conclusion.zh: 微动、精准性、平顺性和回转制动线性是实机操控差距，不能只用纸面主泵流量解释。
conclusion.en: Inching, precision, smoothness and swing-braking linearity are field-control gaps and cannot be explained by pump flow alone.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide

action.zh: 建立手柄输入—阀芯响应—工作装置运动的标定闭环，优先处理回转制动冲击。
action.en: Build a calibration loop from joystick input through spool response to implement motion, prioritizing swing-braking shock.

target_reference.zh: 采用竞品盲测与客观运动曲线，不新增主观总分。
target_reference.en: Use blind benchmark evaluation and objective motion traces without creating a new aggregate score.

verification.zh: 低速位移、制动减速度、回摆量、复合动作轨迹和操作手盲评。
verification.en: Low-speed displacement, braking deceleration, rebound, combined-motion paths and blind operator review.

conclusion.zh: 大体型用户空间、座椅减震、空调、屏幕、侧门操作和手机支架构成一组人机差距。
conclusion.en: Packaging for larger operators, seat suspension, HVAC, display, door operation and phone storage form one ergonomic gap set.

records.source_type: historical user need and internal evaluation
records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide

action.zh: 用北美目标用户人体尺寸开展驾驶室布置和长时舒适性评审，核验PRO历史方案。
action.en: Review cab packaging and long-duration comfort using North American target-user anthropometry, and verify the historical PRO proposal.

target_reference.zh: PPT提及7英寸LCD触摸屏，但当前配置状态待确认。
target_reference.en: The PPT mentions a 7-inch LCD touch display; current configuration status requires confirmation.

verification.zh: 用户诊所、出入便利性、视野、座椅振动、空调降温和界面任务测试。
verification.en: User clinic, ingress/egress, visibility, seat vibration, HVAC pull-down and interface task testing.

conclusion.zh: 维修可达性、独立液压油加注、涂层防锈、管线识别和手册准确性共同影响全生命周期体验。
conclusion.en: Service access, dedicated hydraulic-oil filling, coating corrosion resistance, line identification and manual accuracy jointly affect the ownership lifecycle.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide

action.zh: 建立典型保养任务工时基线；同步开展盐雾/涂层审计、管线标识标准和手册校核。
action.en: Baseline service task times, then run corrosion/coating audits, standardize line identification and verify manuals.

target_reference.zh: 源文件未给出批准目标值。
target_reference.en: No approved target value is provided in the source.

verification.zh: 工时研究、盐雾与附着力试验、售后返修数据和文档抽检。
verification.en: Time study, salt-spray/adhesion testing, service-return data and document sampling.

conclusion.zh: 单一短尾产品难以同时覆盖紧凑运输和开阔场地重载稳定性，PPT建议评估常规尾机型。
conclusion.en: One short-tail model cannot optimally cover both compact transport and heavy, stability-sensitive work in open sites; the PPT recommends evaluating a conventional-tail variant.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide

action.zh: 用销量、工况、价格和渠道反馈建立短尾/常规尾双型谱商业论证。
action.en: Build a short-tail/conventional-tail portfolio business case using volume, applications, price and channel feedback.

target_reference.zh: 不在原型中假定立项或上市时间。
target_reference.en: The prototype assumes neither program approval nor launch timing.

verification.zh: 市场容量、竞品替代关系、成本、稳定性收益和渠道可售性评审。
verification.en: Review market volume, competitor substitution, cost, stability benefit and channel sellability.
